parameters.query: UPDATE maintenance_requests SET status = 'resolved', updated_at = NOW() WHERE '{{ $json.resolveTicket }}' = 'true' AND ticket_id = (SELECT ticket_id FROM maintenance_requests WHERE phone LIKE '%' || RIGHT('{{ $json.phone }}', 10) || '%' AND status = 'open' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) RETURNING ticket_id, status
